dr_section_ref: DR §1 — Indonesian discourse particles (tuh as vindication marker)
notes: Sentence-initial 'tuh' before a vindication statement ('aku sudah bilang' = 'I already said/told') — speaker is invoking prior knowledge to say 'I told you so' gently. English 'There, I already told you' lands the same vindication register. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: 'See, I told you' is more idiomatic English; 'There' is the literal translation of tuh. Either could be the right call depending on tone.
